{
  "transformations": [

      "description": "Build comprehensive AI platform that combines internal data with external sources (LinkedIn, GitHub, job boards) to predict talent movements, identify passive candidates before they're looking, and automatically engage them with personalized campaigns. System learns from every interaction to improve matching accuracy.",

        "scaling_potential": "10x candidate pipeline without adding recruiters",

        "phase_2": "Month 1.5: AI screening interviews, interviewer prep automation (120 hours)",

      },
